_comment: Etsy codename -> Shopify width/size override. Used when Shopify's own data is incomplete/incorrect.

shopify_alias_codenames: one or more Shopify SKU prefixes that represent the same ring at different widths

{width_in_mm}: array of size labels as decimal strings

JDTR124.notes: Both JDTR124 (8mm) and JDTR214 (6mm) are the SAME ring on Shopify, called HERALD. Per Amir 2026-06-08.
